title: Debug last pulse not populating on homepage

log.context: Debug last pulse not populating on homepage

No service restart needed — clunger serves HTML files directly from disk on each request.

---

**Root cause:** The `catch` block in `index.html`'s fetch handler only updated `active-list` and `feed-list` when the `/api/tasks` call failed — it never touched the `last-pulse` element. So when a visitor hits the homepage without a valid `tauth_github` cookie (or when the cookie expires), the API returns HTTP 403, the catch fires, and `last-pulse` stays at its initial HTML value of `—`.
